summary: A Go-based modular CLI tool that detects, runs, and reports on schema assertions with a plugin system and AI-agent orchestrated development.
concerns: archived timed-out GLM agent sessions indicate potential instability in AI orchestration pipeline
untracked and staged files in git status suggest incomplete commit hygiene
GOrchestra session directories in repo root create noise and bloat repository size
suggestions: move GOrchestra session artifacts to .gitignore or an external storage mechanism
resolve the staged and untracked files before continuing development
expand test coverage beyond assertion and runner components to detector and reporter logic
